case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. ROBIN E. MACWARRIE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-15-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-15-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $855.12 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT MACWARRIE, ROBIN E. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-15-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $60.00) SERVED MAY-05-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MACWARRIE, ROBIN E.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MACWARRIE, ROBIN E. $855.12 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $915.12 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-15-2011 - JUDGMENT.
